title: rubus pinnatisepalus var. pinnatisepalus
intro: Rubus pinnatisepalus var. pinnatisepalus is a variety of the raspberry plant native to East Asia, characterized by its pinnate leaves and edible fruits. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pinnatisepalus var. pinnatisepalus include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving blood sugar control, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used in herbal infusions and decoctions.
